zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabelle de Lusignan於1224年2月4日出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安格斯時，她的父親Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche41歲，母親Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England38歲。她於大約1240年與Maurice IV de Craon結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1300年1月14日在法國波代波奧沃易-素-梅享年75歲，埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安格斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabelle de Lusignan于1224年2月4日出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安格斯时，她的父亲Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche41岁，母亲Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England38岁。她于大约1240年与Maurice IV de Craon结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1300年1月14日在法国波代波奧沃易-素-梅享年75岁，埋葬在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安格斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lusignan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Andre, Francois, Lucien, Marcel.
French: habitational name from Lusignan, a place in Vienne. This surname is very rare in France. Compare   Zeno  .

History: Jean Miel (or Amiel) dit Lusignan from Lusignan in Vienne, France, married Marie-Thérèse Latouche in Boucherville, QC, in 1699. — A French family called (de) Lusignan became enormously powerful in the eastern Mediterranean during the Middle Ages. Guy de Lusignan (1129–94) was king of Cyprus from 1192 to 1194 (and before that, by right of marriage, king of the crusader state of Jerusalem). Hugues de Lusignan was king of Cyprus from 1267 to 1284 and king of Jerusalem from 1268 to 1284. During the 14th century, Lusignans became kings of the Armenian kingdom of Cilicia (on the Mediterranean coast of what is now Turkey, facing Cyprus).

variants.name: Zeno
meanings: Italian (mainly southern Italy), Hispanic (mainly Puerto Rico), and African American: from the personal name Zeno, classical Greek Zēnōn, a derivative of Zeus, the name of the king of the gods in Greek mythology. Zeno or Zenone is the name of a 4th-century Italian saint from Verona. As an African American name it was probably adopted in honor of the Stoic philosopher Zeno of Kition.

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabelle de Lusignan was born on 4 February 1224, in Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, her father, Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche, was 41 and her mother, Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, was 38. She married Maurice IV de Craon about 1240. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 14 January 1300, in Beauvoir-sur-Mer, Vendée, France, at the age of 75, and was buried in Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabelle de Lusignan est née le 4 février 1224, à Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Maurice IV de Craon environ 1240. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 janvier 1300, à Beauvoir-sur-Mer, Vendée, France, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabelle de Lusignan am 4. Februar 1224 in Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche 41 und ihre Mutter Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England 38. Sie hat um 1240 Maurice IV de Craon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. Januar 1300 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Beauvoir-sur-Mer, Vendée, Frankreich und wurde in Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Lusignan è nata il il 4 febbraio 1224 nel Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, sua padre, Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Maurice IV de Craon circa 1240. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 14 gennaio 1300, nel Beauvoir-sur-Mer, Vendée, Francia, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Lusignanが1224年2月4日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーアンジャーズで生まれた時，父Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marcheは41歳，母Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of Englandは38歳であった。約1240年にMaurice IV de Craonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1300年1月14日にフランスベンドeビーウボイル-スル-マーで75歳で死去し，フランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーアンジャーズにて埋葬された。

ko.Angers,49007,Maine-et-Loire,Pays de la L: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 앤그르스

ko.Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 앤그르스
ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle de Lusignan(이)가 1224년 2월 4일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 앤그르스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 대략 1240년 Maurice IV de Craon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1300년 1월 14일 프랑스 븐드e 보보이-수-머에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 앤그르스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle de Lusignan nasceu em 4 de fevereiro de 1224, em Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Maurice IV de Craon aproximadamente 1240. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de janeiro de 1300, em Beauvoir-sur-Mer, Vendée, França, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França.

ru.Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire: ангирс, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabelle de Lusignan родилась 4 февраля 1224 г. в местности ангирс, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Maurice IV de Craon около 1240 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 14 января 1300 г. в местности бовоир-сур-мир, вендe, Франция в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности ангирс, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabelle de Lusignan nació el 4 de febrero de 1224, en Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, su papá, Hugues X de Lusignan Comte de la Marche, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Maurice IV de Craon aproximadamente 1240. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 14 de enero de 1300, en Beauvoir-sur-Mer, Vendée, Francia, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia.
